lane_0_pressure.reason: Lark blocked by SDK token attach issue; switch to isolated Tavily 405 diagnostic

lane_6_tavily_runtime_tool_list.runtime_startup_error: HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed for https://mcp.tavily.com/mcp

lane_7_tavily_405_diagnostic.method_or_endpoint_suspected: HTTP 405 on POST to https://mcp.tavily.com/mcp — Tavily MCP SSE endpoint does not support POST; SSE endpoint requires GET with SSE stream; langchain_mcp_adapters uses POST which Tavily rejects with 405

lane_8_result_classification.root_cause: langchain_mcp_adapters client uses POST request for SSE transport; Tavily MCP SSE endpoint at https://mcp.tavily.com/mcp only accepts GET; mismatch causes 405
lane_8_result_classification.config_preservation: Tavily correctly enabled with env var; key not in URL; lark correctly disabled

lane_9_commit.commit_message: chore(mcp): pause Lark and isolate Tavily probe

lane_10_next_phase_decision.rationale: Tavily 405 confirmed: langchain_mcp_adapters uses POST but Tavily SSE endpoint requires GET. R147J should investigate whether to use stdio transport (npx @tavily/mcp-server) instead of SSE, or fix the transport configuration.

lane_11_unknown_registry_updates.description: langchain_mcp_adapters SSE client uses POST request to establish SSE connection; Tavily MCP endpoint at https://mcp.tavily.com/mcp returns 405 Method Not Allowed — endpoint only accepts GET for SSE handshake
lane_11_unknown_registry_updates.fix_applied: R147I: 405 confirmed; R147J should evaluate stdio transport for Tavily MCP

lane_11_unknown_registry_updates.description: Tavily configured with 'type: sse' transport but langchain_mcp_adapters may be incompatible with Tavily's SSE endpoint requirements; stdio transport (npx @tavily/mcp-server) may be the correct approach
lane_11_unknown_registry_updates.fix_applied: R147I: isolated diagnostic captured; R147J should evaluate stdio transport

lane_11_unknown_registry_updates.description: Lark MCP disabled in extensions_config.json due to SDK token attach bug (99991661 persists across R147D-R147G); lark.enabled=false; lark can be re-enabled after SDK patch
